pattern: USDA xform op <value> is not supported yet.
resolution: Add parser and matrix support for every authored USDA xform op before removing this entry.

pattern: USDA normal transforms require affine matrices.
resolution: Support or explicitly model non-affine normal transforms.

pattern: SdfFieldValue <value> at <value> is unmaterialized and cannot be exported to USDA without data loss.
resolution: Preserve the unmaterialized field payload with enough type and raw data to re-export it losslessly, or add typed decoding for the field.

pattern: SdfFieldValue <value> at <value> requires statement-style USDA authoring and cannot be exported inside a dictionary without data loss.
resolution: Add typed dictionary entry authoring for list operations and asset reference values before allowing these values inside dictionaries.

pattern: USDA cannot export dictionary field <value> with value <value> without data loss.
resolution: Add typed dictionary entry authoring for every remaining SdfFieldValue case before allowing those values in metadata dictionaries or reference customData.

pattern: USDA dictionary type <value> is not supported by swift-OpenUSD authoring yet.
resolution: Extend typed dictionary parsing to materialize the remaining OpenUSD dictionary value types instead of preserving unsupported metadata dictionaries as authored text or rejecting reference customData.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export metadata list operation field <value> at <value> to USDA without data loss.
resolution: Register the metadata field's list-op item type and teach USDAReader to materialize it before allowing arbitrary metadata list-op export.

pattern: USDA cannot export unmaterialized metadata field <value> without data loss.
resolution: Preserve enough raw typed metadata payload to re-export unmaterialized fields losslessly.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export authored fields <value> on variant <value>.
resolution: Add structured variant body authoring so variant fields can be emitted instead of rejecting them.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export authored fields <value> on variant set <value>.
resolution: Add variantSet metadata writer support or normalize those fields during parsing before allowing export.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export authored fields on target spec <value> to USDA without data loss.
resolution: Add connection and relationship target-spec metadata writing, or preserve the target spec as an explicit authored statement.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export path list field <value> at <value> to USDA without data loss.
resolution: Teach USDAWriter every supported path-list field syntax before accepting arbitrary path-list fields.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export asset reference field <value> at <value> to USDA without data loss.
resolution: Teach USDAReader and USDAWriter to round-trip reference and payload list operations on arbitrary metadata fields before allowing export.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export variant <value> because it mixes raw body text with structured child specs.
resolution: Define a merge strategy for raw variant body text and structured variant child specs, then add round-trip tests for mixed authoring.

pattern: SdfLayer cannot export variant set <value> because it mixes raw body text with structured variant specs.
resolution: Define a merge strategy for raw variantSet body text and structured variant specs, then add round-trip tests for mixed authoring.

pattern: USDA cannot export variant <value> because it mixes raw body text with structured child specs.
resolution: Define a merge strategy for raw variant body text and structured variant child specs, then add writer tests that prove no child specs are dropped.

pattern: SdfLayer spec type <value> is not supported by swift-OpenUSD authoring yet.
resolution: Add authoring and writer semantics for mapper, mapper argument, and expression specs before accepting them.

pattern: SdfSpec type <value> is not supported by swift-OpenUSD authoring yet.
resolution: Add path invariants and writer semantics for mapper, mapper argument, and expression specs before accepting them.

pattern: plugInfo Includes require file resolution; use registerPlugInfo(at:) instead.
resolution: Keep data-only registration explicit, or introduce an include resolver dependency that can resolve Includes without filesystem access.

pattern: USD schema plugin <value> type <value> is generated but generatedSchema.usda was not available.
resolution: Load generatedSchema.usda from the plugin resource path or add an explicit schema definition source before registering generated schema types.

pattern: USDC quatd arrays are not materialized yet.
resolution: Expose quaternion arrays through USDCLayerFieldValue and USD scene materialization.

pattern: USDC quatf arrays are not materialized yet.
resolution: Expose quaternion arrays through USDCLayerFieldValue and USD scene materialization.

pattern: USDC quath values are not materialized yet.
resolution: Add half-precision quaternion decoding or a typed value-preservation surface.

pattern: USDC matrix4d arrays are not materialized yet.
resolution: Expose matrix arrays through USDCLayerFieldValue and USD scene materialization.

pattern: USDC value type <value> is not materialized yet.
resolution: Add typed decoding for the missing crate value type or preserve it as an explicit raw field value.

pattern: Only one-dimensional USDC <value>s are supported.
resolution: Add shaped array metadata preservation before accepting higher-rank USDC arrays.

pattern: USDC normal transforms require affine matrices.
resolution: Support or explicitly model non-affine normal transforms.

pattern: USDC crate version <value> is newer than the supported reader version.
resolution: Audit newer OpenUSD crate versions and update newestKnownVersion after fixture coverage is added.

pattern: USDC crate version <value> is older than the supported reader version.
resolution: Add legacy crate fixture coverage before accepting older crate versions.

pattern: USDC xform op <value> is not supported yet.
resolution: Add materialization for every authored USDC xform op before removing this entry.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is not a USD layer.
resolution: Define supported non-layer asset access paths or keep rejection for layer-only resolution.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is not a nested USDZ package.
resolution: Define nested package traversal behavior for non-USDZ entries.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is compressed.
resolution: Decide whether compressed ZIP entries are supported; USDZ normally requires stored entries.

pattern: USDZ package uses unsupported ZIP disk or comment fields.
resolution: Add explicit support and fixtures for ZIP comments or multi-disk metadata if needed.

pattern: USDZ local entry at <value> is compressed.
resolution: Decide whether compressed ZIP entries are supported; USDZ normally requires stored entries.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is encrypted.
resolution: Keep rejecting encrypted entries unless an authenticated decryption API is introduced.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> uses a data descriptor.
resolution: Add descriptor parsing fixtures or keep rejection for deterministic random-access reads.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is not a USD layer.
resolution: Define supported non-layer asset access paths or keep rejection for layer-only resolution.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is not a nested USDZ package.
resolution: Define nested package traversal behavior for non-USDZ entries.

pattern: USDZ nested default package <value> must contain a USD default layer.
resolution: Add nested default package semantics and fixtures for non-layer nested defaults.

pattern: USDZ default layer must be the first file and use a USD extension.
resolution: Keep enforcing USDZ default-layer ordering or add a documented alternate root-layer selection API.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is not a USD layer.
resolution: Define supported non-layer asset access paths or keep rejection for layer-only resolution.

pattern: USDZ entry <value> is not a nested USDZ package.
resolution: Define nested package traversal behavior for non-USDZ entries.

pattern: USDZ layer <value> is not a USD layer.
resolution: Define whether non-layer entries can be addressed through layer path APIs.

pattern: USDA property spec <value> has an unsupported variability value <value>.
resolution: Normalize variability metadata during parsing so only uniform or varying values reach the writer, or extend the writer to author additional variability values.

pattern: USDStage composition cannot apply a layer offset to non-authored timeSamples at <value>.
resolution: Store timeSamples as typed values so layer offsets can be applied without re-parsing authored text.

pattern: USDStage composition cannot remap timeSamples at <value> because the authored payload could not be parsed.
resolution: Parse authored timeSamples payloads into typed samples so layer offsets remap them losslessly.

pattern: USDStage composition cannot apply a layer offset to non-numeric <value> layer metadata.
resolution: Reject non-numeric startTimeCode and endTimeCode values at parse time or add typed timeCode metadata storage.

pattern: USDStage composition cannot compose list operations whose stronger operation uses added or ordered items.
resolution: Implement upstream SdfListOp composition semantics for added and ordered item lists.

pattern: USDStage composition cannot compose list operations whose weaker operation uses added or ordered items.
resolution: Implement upstream SdfListOp composition semantics for added and ordered item lists.
